name: Dijiangmon

signature_move.name: Kyōsenkai
signature_move.description: Blows the enemy away with a shock wave generated by swinging its long tail.

description: A Mutation Digimon with a grotesque appearance, whose whole body is covered in leather. Since it doesn't speak nor try to express anything with its body, it usually just stands at a spot in an eerie silence. Generally speaking, it has no interest in self-expression, and is an evil Digimon that specializes only in robbing others of life. It slips into crowds of Digimon from out of nowhere and sends out a signal, in a manner similar to telepathy, that stimulates their combat instinct and causes the Digimon to fight each other, bringing about chaos. Its Special Moves are blowing the enemy away with a shock wave generated by swinging its long tail ( Kyōsenkai ), and binding enemies using its extensible arms, then knocking them down from the sky ( Jurenshōkoku ). In addition, in its " Konton Akūkyo ", in which it opens the zippers on its body to pull the opponent in, not even Dijiangmon itself knows where they will disappear to once they have been swallowed.
